name: PayFit Payroll & HR API
what_it_does: Automated payroll and HR management platform for European SMBs with REST API — covering France, Spain, Germany, UK, Belgium, Italy with country-specific payroll compliance automation, employee onboarding, expense management, and HRIS integration.
use_cases: Automating French payroll (fiche de paie) with all social contributions via API
Syncing employee master data from HRIS to PayFit for European payroll processing
Querying payslip and payroll cost data for financial reporting via API
Managing employee onboarding and contract lifecycle across EU countries
Integrating PayFit expense data with accounting systems via webhook
not_for: Global payroll beyond Europe (use Deel or Papaya Global)
Large enterprise payroll with complex collective agreements (use SAP or ADP)
US domestic payroll (PayFit does not cover North America)
best_when: A European SMB (especially French companies) needs country-specific payroll automation with HRIS integration API and compliance expertise built-in.
avoid_when: You operate outside Europe, need global payroll consolidation, or require enterprise-grade payroll with dedicated specialists.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for partner integrations. API key for direct access. Scoped access for employee data, payroll data, HR events. French company — EU GDPR-first. Company ID required in API calls.

pricing.paid_tiers: From approximately €6-12/employee/month depending on country and features
pricing.notes: European SMB-focused pricing. Paris-based unicorn (€254M raised). Coverage: France, UK, Germany, Spain, Belgium, Italy. Country-specific payroll compliance is the key value proposition. Strong Personio and BambooHR integrations. API via partner program.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for employees, payroll, expenses, time-off, and reporting. OAuth2 with scopes for HRIS integration. Webhook for payroll and HR events. Country-specific payroll rules make data models complex. French-first documentation (may have translation gaps).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee data reads idempotent. Payroll processing sequential — not idempotent. Time-off requests create new records. Payslip queries idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Country-specific data models — French payroll fields differ significantly from UK/Germany
Payroll processing tied to country-specific calendar and legal requirements
API documentation primarily French — English translation may be incomplete
Annual contract required — not suitable for short-term or experimental integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant — French company with strong EU privacy culture. OAuth2 with scopes. EU-only data residency. Payroll data handled with highest security standards per French labor law.
